allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('bin:', JSON.stringify\(p.bin\)\); console.log\('main:', p.main\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports, null,2\).slice\(0,300\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const buf=fs.readFileSync\('f:/work/Floodgate/build/icon.ico'\); console.log\('ICO size:', buf.length, 'bytes'\); console.log\('Magic bytes:', buf[0], buf[1], buf[2], buf[3]\);")
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\''electron|floodgate|Floodgate'\\'' } | Select-Object Name, Id, Path')

Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'F:\\work\\Floodgate\\dist' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Test-Path 'F:\\work\\Floodgate\\dist'\) { Write-Output 'still exists' } else { Write-Output 'deleted' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Service WSearch -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'F:\\work\\Floodgate\\dist' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; if \(Test-Path 'F:\\work\\Floodgate\\dist'\) { Write-Output 'still locked' } else { Write-Output 'deleted OK' }")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process node, npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id, CommandLine 2>/dev/null; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -match '\\''Floodgate'\\'' } | Select-Object Name, Id 2>/dev/null')
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node, npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id")
